message:
test(fcp-crypto): AEAD encrypt/decrypt proptests for ChaCha20 + XChaCha20

Five new proptest cases (48 per relation = 240 trials) that lift the
single-case AEAD identity/tamper tests into property space:

  * M1 (ChaCha20-Poly1305) — decrypt(encrypt(k, n, pt, aad), ..) == pt
  * M2 (ChaCha20-Poly1305) — any single-byte flip in ciphertext|tag
    yields AeadDecryptFailed (Poly1305 integrity contract)
  * M3 (ChaCha20-Poly1305) — decrypt with different aad fails
    (prop_assume discards aad1 == aad2 draws)
  * M1 (XChaCha20-Poly1305) — identity over the extended-nonce variant
  * M2 (XChaCha20-Poly1305) — byte-flip tamper rejection

Nonce reuse safety: each case generates a fresh (key, nonce) pair, so
we never reuse a nonce under the same key within the proptest — safe
even for ChaCha20 which has a 12-byte nonce.

Lives next to the existing single-case roundtrip tests in aead.rs.
Complements the 2be6c328 Ed25519 metamorphic proptests (M1-M5 for
sign/verify) and the existing hpke_encrypt_then_decrypt_identity_relation
proptest in hpke_seal.rs. Taxonomy follows /testing-metamorphic.

Verified with
  CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/fcp-review-A cargo test \
    -p fcp-crypto --lib aead::
→ 59 passed, 0 failed (includes all 5 new proptests).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
